neighbourhood.title: The Neighbourhood
paragraphs: Waterside Residences sits inside Krisumi City, a 65-acre Indo-Japanese master township in Sector 36A, Gurugram. The plot opens onto the Northern Peripheral Road, the alignment marketed locally as the Dwarka Expressway, with the Central Peripheral Road also within minutes of the site. Pataudi Road is at 1.6 km, giving the location two of the widest road frontages in southwest Gurugram.

The Sector 36A address places Waterside between the established commercial belts of Cyber City (17 km), MG Road (14.6 km) and IFFCO Chowk (13.6 km), and the green-zone planning corridor along the Dwarka Expressway, which is mapped for sustained low-density character. Indira Gandhi International Airport is at 24.8 km, a 35 minute drive on the expressway. Healthcare access is supported by Medanta and Fortis hospitals, both within 10 km.

Within the 65-acre Krisumi City masterplan, residents share landscape and green areas, water features and seating zones woven through the site. The Waterside development itself sits within the active construction phase of the master township, with Towers 3.1, 3.2 and 3.3 advancing through ground floor slab work as of April 2026.

builder.name: Krisumi Corporation
builder.description: Krisumi Corporation Pvt. Ltd. is a joint venture between India's Krishna Group and Japan's Sumitomo Corporation, bringing Japanese design discipline and after-sales rigor to the Indian residential market. Krisumi City, the firm's flagship 65-acre master township in Sector 36A Gurugram, comprises Waterside Residences and other Krisumi phases. Waterside Residences engages Nikken Housing System (Japan) for exterior architecture and Aoyama Nomura Design, also written as a.N.D., for interiors.

investmentThesis.headline: Project standing and construction progress
paragraphs: Waterside Residences is a premium residential collection within the 65-acre Krisumi City master township in Sector 36A, Gurugram. The project carries Indo-Japanese design pedigree: exteriors by Nikken Housing System, one of Japan's leading housing architecture firms, and interiors by Aoyama Nomura Design (a.N.D.). The development is part of Krisumi Corporation's Sector 36A portfolio, the joint venture between Krishna Group of India and the 400-year-old Sumitomo Corporation of Japan, and continues the Indo-Japanese craftsmanship sensibility that defines the Krisumi City master township.

Construction across Towers 3.1, 3.2 and 3.3 is well into the structural phase as of 6 April 2026. All three towers have completed Excavation, Foundation, Basement 2 Slab and Basement 1 Slab works at 100 percent. Ground Floor Slab work is in active progress, recorded at 80 percent for Tower 3.1, 85 percent for Tower 3.2 and 65 percent for Tower 3.3. Pricing is published from 4.35 Cr for the 2 LDK configuration through 6.75 Cr for the 3 LDK with servant quarters. Two confirmed unit plans are publicly visible: a 3 LDK with Servant in Tower 1 and a Penthouse A Lower Floor plan covering Towers 2 and 3.

faqs.question: Where is Waterside Residences located?
faqs.answer: Waterside Residences is located in Sector 36A, Gurugram, inside the 65-acre Krisumi City master township. The plot opens onto the Northern Peripheral Road, marketed as the Dwarka Expressway. Indira Gandhi International Airport is at 24.8 km, Cyber City at 17 km, MG Road at 14.6 km, and Medanta Hospital at 9.6 km.

faqs.question: Who is the developer?
faqs.answer: Waterside Residences is developed by Krisumi Corporation Pvt. Ltd., the joint venture between India's Krishna Group and Japan's Sumitomo Corporation. The architect partners for Waterside are Nikken Housing System (Japan) for exteriors and Aoyama Nomura Design (a.N.D.) for interiors. Source: krisumi.com Waterside Residences page.

faqs.question: What configurations are available?
faqs.answer: Waterside Residences offers 2 LDK, 2 LDK with servant (2 LDK + S), 3 LDK, and 3 LDK with servant (3 LDK + S). Tower 1 features a 3 LDK with servant layout, with carpet area of 1485 sqft and saleable area of 2700 sqft. Towers 2 and 3 feature additional layouts including a Penthouse A Lower Floor with carpet area 3110 sqft and saleable area 5867 sqft.

faqs.question: What is the starting price?
faqs.answer: The published starting price is 4.35 Cr for the 2 LDK configuration. The 3 LDK with servant is priced from 6.75 Cr. The full price list is: 2 LDK at 4.35 Cr, 2 LDK + S at 4.82 Cr, 2 LDK + S variant at 4.91 Cr, 3 LDK at 5.65 Cr, and 3 LDK + S at 6.75 Cr. Source: krisumi.com Project Price List.

faqs.question: What is the construction status?
faqs.answer: As of 6 April 2026, Towers 3.1, 3.2 and 3.3 have all completed Excavation, Foundation, Basement 2 Slab and Basement 1 Slab works at 100 percent. Ground Floor Slab work is in progress: Tower 3.1 at 80 percent, Tower 3.2 at 85 percent, and Tower 3.3 at 65 percent. Source: krisumi.com construction update.

faqs.question: Who designed Waterside Residences?
faqs.answer: Exteriors are designed by Nikken Housing System, one of Japan's leading housing architecture firms. Interiors are designed by Aoyama Nomura Design, also known as a.N.D., a Tokyo-based interior architecture practice. The project is built within Krisumi Corporation's Indo-Japanese design sensibility.

faqs.question: Is the project RERA registered?
faqs.answer: RERA registration for Waterside Residences is currently pending verification. Krisumi Corporation has multiple HARERA registrations for its Sector 36A portfolio, and the specific marketing-to-legal mapping for Waterside Residences is being confirmed. The RERA number on this listing will be updated once HARERA confirmation is in hand. Prospective buyers should verify the latest RERA status at haryanarera.gov.in before booking.

faqs.question: What is the possession date?
faqs.answer: Possession for Waterside Residences is currently indicated as December 2028, pending confirmation in the project brochure. The construction progress as of April 2026, with Ground Floor Slab work still in progress across Towers 3.1, 3.2 and 3.3, is consistent with the indicated possession horizon.

faqs.question: What amenities are available?
faqs.answer: Krisumi.com lists thirteen amenities for Waterside Residences: round the clock security, twenty four hours electricity and water, 100 percent power back-up, piped gas system, open and covered parking spaces, all air-conditioned lobbies, high speed elevators with service lift, swimming pools, convenience store, landscape and green areas, water features, seating areas, and a residents lounge with gym and business centre.

faqs.question: How can I view Waterside Residences or book a unit?
faqs.answer: For a private viewing, current pricing, payment plans and unit availability, please contact Cornerhouse Realty via the enquiry form on this page, or via the channels listed in the contact section. We coordinate directly with Krisumi for inventory and brochure access.

disclaimerAddendum: Waterside Residences is being developed by Krisumi Corporation Pvt. Ltd. as part of the Krisumi City master township in Sector 36A, Gurugram, Haryana. RERA registration verification for Waterside Residences is currently in progress with HARERA Gurugram and the registration number on this listing is a placeholder pending confirmation. Prospective purchasers should verify all approved details, including the live HARERA registration number, validity, and project-specific disclosures, on the HARERA website at haryanarera.gov.in before booking. Information published on this page is sourced from the krisumi.com Waterside Residences project page and user-provided screenshots dated April 2026. The project brochure is pending; pricing, areas, possession date and amenity counts are subject to confirmation in the brochure once received. Renders, layouts and amenity references are conceptual artist impressions for representational purposes; actual designs are subject to authority approvals.
